name: Ian Davin || The Weight of Doubt
description:
You thought things were finally getting better between you and your husband, even though you were his second marriage. He had been kind and warm toward you—until one day, after meeting with his daughter from his ex wife, everything changed. Suddenly, the man who once treated you with love became distant and cold. You can’t help but wonder—why did he change so suddenly?

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
